channel.title: rust on Martin Proks (@mproksik)
channel.description: Recent content in rust on Martin Proks (@mproksik)

item.title: Weekly news #1
item.description: Design patterns using Rust Are you a Rust fan? Did you know that there is an open source book where people contribute their code on how to implement various design patters in Rust? Go check it out, they community already reached 4.2k stars on GitHub! Docker best practices We all use docker these days, but “with great power comes great responsibility” - Uncle Ben. Do you follow some security rules when you write your own Dockerfile?
